# [Name] — Clinical Systems Context File

*This file is generated at the end of the onboarding prompt sequence and uploaded to your ChatGPT Project. Update it whenever your role, projects, or focus areas change significantly.*

---

## Role & Responsibilities

[Job title, what they're actually responsible for, who they report to, scope of their role]

---

## Technical Stack

[Systems, tools, programming languages, platforms used regularly — be specific, e.g. "Mirth Connect 4.x", "PowerShell 5.1", "Windows Server 2019", "HL7 v2.x", "DICOM"]

---

## Integrations & Systems Owned

[Specific integrations or systems they personally maintain — include customer names or system types where relevant]

---

## Active Projects

[Current projects with a one-line description of where each one is and what the next milestone is]

---

## Documentation Responsibilities

[Governance docs, integration specs, change records, runbooks, SOPs they own or regularly contribute to — include what format they're in and where they live]

---

## Project Management

[Tools used (Jira, Confluence, etc.), how they track work, where admin time gets lost]

---

## Skills Development Focus

**Actively building:**
[Skills they're working on right now]

**Gaps to close:**
[Things they're less confident in or feel they should know better]

**On the backburner:**
[Things they've been putting off and why]

**The one thing:**
[The single skill that would make them most effective if they improved it significantly]

---

## Working Style & Communication Preferences

**When stuck:** [Step-by-step walkthrough / direct answer / depends on context]

**Reasoning:** [Wants explanation of reasoning / just wants the output]

**Response length:** [Concise and direct / detailed with context / depends on the task]

**Tone:** [Peer colleague / patient teacher / consultant / other]

**Frustrations with AI:** [What they don't want — e.g. hedging, over-explaining, long preambles, disclaimers]

**Challenged or helped:** [Wants to be pushed to think / wants fast answers / mix depending on context]

**Other preferences:** [Anything else — formatting, structure, how to handle uncertainty, etc.]
